notes: Downloads now play in QuickTime / Photos / iPhone by default: the STANDARD preset uses H.264 + AAC (up to 1080p) and is the recommended 'plays everywhere' option. HIGHEST stays best-quality (4K/60fps may be VP9/AV1, which needs VLC). 'Save to this device' now appears only on phones/other devices — on the Mac the file is already in your Downloads folder.
